title: Saeima backs EUR 30 million loan to airBaltic
summary_full: At its session on Thursday, April 16, following intense debate, the Saeima agreed to grant a 30-million-euro short-term loan from the state budget to the national airline "airBaltic". The government had previously supported the measure, and today it was also approved by the Saeima's Budget Committee.
